## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution
What should happen? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
What else have you considered?

## Additional Context
Any references, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
